proof:
have h1 : (0 : ℝ) < 1 := by norm_num
  have hden : (0 : ℝ) < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg |x|, abs_nonneg x]
  have h2 : (0 : ℝ) < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    exact div_pos hε hden
  simpa [δ] using lt_min h1 h2
failed_attempts:
have hden : 0 < (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by nlinarith
  have hfrac : 0 < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    exact div_pos hε hden
  simpa [δ] using lt_min (by norm_num) hfrac

have hden : 0 < (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 : ℝ) := by nlinarith
  have hfrac : 0 < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    exact div_pos hε hden
  have hmin : 0 < min (1 : ℝ) (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) := by
    exact lt_min (by linarith) hfrac
  simpa [δ] using hmin

have hden : 0 < (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by nlinarith
  have hfrac : 0 < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    exact div_pos hε hden
  have : 0 < min 1 (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) := by
    exact lt_min (by norm_num) hfrac
  simpa [δ] using this

have h1 : (0 : ℝ) < (1 : ℝ) := by norm_num
  have hden : (0 : ℝ) < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by nlinarith
  have h2 : (0 : ℝ) < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    exact div_pos hε hden
  simpa [δ] using lt_min h1 h2

dsimp [δ]
  have h1 : (0 : ℝ) < (1 : ℝ) := by linarith
  have hden : (0 : ℝ) < (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by nlinarith
  have h2 : (0 : ℝ) < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    exact div_pos hε hden
  exact lt_min h1 h2

have h1 : (0 : ℝ) < 1 := by norm_num
  have hden : (0 : ℝ) < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg |x|, abs_nonneg x]

  have hden : (0 : ℝ) < (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|x| : ℝ), abs_nonneg x]
  have hfrac : (0 : ℝ) < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
    exact div_pos hε hden
